---
title: "FRAIMEL"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header: assets/landing-head.html
    include-after-body: assets/landing-after-body.html
---
<p class="text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-cyan-300/80 mb-4 animate-fade-in">
  FRAIMEL · A High-Signal Growth Space
</p>

<h1 class="text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold text-white leading-tight animate-fade-in">
  数学 · 机器学习理论 ·  
  <span class="text-cyan-400">可执行的成长路径</span>
</h1>

<p class="mt-6 text-base md:text-xl text-gray-300 max-w-2xl mx-auto animate-fade-in-delay-1">
  来自一位偏理论研究者的长期主义空间：梳理概率、优化、RL、Diffusion 等核心脉络，
  把「看得懂论文」和「写得出代码」变成一条可走的路。
</p>

<!-- CTA 区域 -->
<div class="mt-10 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4 animate-fade-in-delay-2">
  <a href="guides/index.qmd"
     class="inline-flex items-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full bg-cyan-500 text-slate-950 font-semibold text-sm md:text-base shadow-lg shadow-cyan-500/40 hover:bg-cyan-400 transition transform hover:-translate-y-0.5">
    <i data-lucide="compass" class="w-5 h-5 mr-2"></i>
    浏览 Guides 知识地图
  </a>

  <a href="posts/index.qmd"
     class="inline-flex items-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-slate-500/70 text-gray-100 font-medium text-sm md:text-base hover:border-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-200 transition">
    <i data-lucide="pen-square" class="w-5 h-5 mr-2"></i>
    最近在思考什么
  </a>

  <a href="papers/index.qmd"
     class="inline-flex items-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-slate-700 text-gray-300 font-medium text-sm md:text-base hover:border-indigo-400 hover:text-indigo-200 transition">
    <i data-lucide="library" class="w-5 h-5 mr-2"></i>
    Paper Picks & Notes
  </a>
</div>

<!-- 社交 / 外链 -->
<div class="mt-10 flex justify-center space-x-6 text-gray-400 text-sm animate-fade-in-delay-2">
  <a href="https://github.com/MIStatlE" class="hover:text-cyan-400 inline-flex items-center gap-1">
    <i data-lucide="github" class="w-5 h-5"></i> GitHub
  </a>
  <a href="posts/index.xml" class="hover:text-cyan-400 inline-flex items-center gap-1">
    <i data-lucide="rss" class="w-5 h-5"></i> RSS
  </a>
  <a href="about.qmd" class="hover:text-cyan-400 inline-flex items-center gap-1">
    <i data-lucide="user-round" class="w-5 h-5"></i> About
  </a>
</div>

<!-- Guides -->
<a href="guides/index.qmd"
   class="bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-800/90 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 hover:border-cyan-400/80 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-950/40 block mt-16">
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
    <h2 class="text-base font-semibold text-white">Guides</h2>
    <i data-lucide="map" class="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-300"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-300">
    把概率、优化、ML Theory、RL / Diffusion 写成可循的路径，
    像 syllabus 却比课本更贴近实战和直觉。
  </p>
</a>

<!-- Paper Picks -->
<a href="papers/index.qmd"
   class="bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-800/90 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 hover:border-indigo-400/80 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-950/40 block mt-6">
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
    <h2 class="text-base font-semibold text-white">Paper Picks</h2>
    <i data-lucide="book-open-check" class="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-300"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-300">
    有选择地读论文：为什么值得读、核心贡献是什么、放在更大图景中的哪一块。
  </p>
</a>

<!-- Posts -->
<a href="posts/index.qmd"
   class="bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-800/90 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 hover:border-emerald-400/80 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-950/40 block mt-6">
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
    <h2 class="text-base font-semibold text-white">Posts</h2>
    <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-300"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-300">
    一些阶段性的想法：科研路径、成长系统、工具使用、以及和 AI 共生的工作方式。
  </p>
</a>

<!-- Tools / Workflows -->
<a href="tools/index.qmd"
   class="bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-800/90 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 hover:border-amber-400/80 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-950/40 block mt-6">
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
    <h2 class="text-base font-semibold text-white">Tools</h2>
    <i data-lucide="wrench" class="w-5 h-5 text-amber-300"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-300">
    写论文、做实验、记笔记、管理引用的那一整套工程与工作流，
    更偏「可复制的 setup」而不是炫技。
  </p>
</a>
